text: Being here, in this modern, well-lit space, I feel both curious and contemplative. The stark lines of glass and steel give the area a clinical yet open aura. Upon entering the R+D exhibition, I am greeted by bold letters and lively colors, which awaken my sense of inquiry. There is an unfolding dialogue here—between past and future, creativity and logic. I am energized by the palpable presence of innovation, but also slightly disoriented by the stark newness and the faint echo of unanswered questions about the future of human and machine interaction.
